# ntfy_access (Data Source)

Reads an existing ntfy access grant.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "ntfy_access" "example" {
  username = "myuser"
  topic    = "alerts"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `topic` (String) The topic to look up.
- `username` (String) The username to look up.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier (format: username/topic).
- `permission` (String) The permission level: read-write, read-only, write-only, or deny.
